description: Approved Data Analytics golden reference templates for generated Dashboard pages and Data List forms. Generated analytics controls must clone one approved template and preserve its export-shaped style, layout, and typography contract.

references.lockedRule: The pie_chart_with_title_wrapper subtree and every non-editable descendant must preserve the exported style, layout, and typography settings. Only data-source binding inside pie_chart_container and the business text value of pie_chart_title may change.
whenToUse: Use when users need part-to-whole distribution by category, status, type, or ownership.
Use for compact composition metrics that fit a Dashboard two-column or three-column section.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for time-series trends.
Do not use when many categories make a pie chart unreadable.

references.lockedRule: The column_chart_with_title_wrapper subtree and every non-editable descendant must preserve the exported style, layout, and typography settings. Only data-source binding inside column_chart_container and the business text value of column_chart_title may change.
whenToUse: Use when users need vertical comparison across statuses, priorities, categories, teams, or periods.
Use for count or numeric aggregate comparisons where column height is the primary signal.
whenNotToUse: Do not use when horizontal label space is required; use the bar chart template instead.
Do not use for pivot-style cross-tab analysis.

references.lockedRule: The bar_chart_with_title_wrapper subtree and every non-editable descendant must preserve the exported style, layout, and typography settings. Only data-source binding inside bar_chart_container and the business text value of bar_chart_title may change.
whenToUse: Use when users need horizontal comparison across categories with longer labels.
Use for ranked counts, grouped categories, request types, or backlog distribution.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for time-series line movement.
Do not use when the requirement is a cross-tab pivot table.

references.lockedRule: The line_chart_with_title_wrapper subtree and every non-editable descendant must preserve the exported style, layout, and typography settings. Only data-source binding inside line_chart_container and the business text value of line_chart_title may change.
whenToUse: Use when users need trend movement over time.
Use for created, completed, approved, overdue, usage, or volume trends by date or period.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for categorical part-to-whole distribution.
Do not use when there is no time or ordered dimension.

references.lockedRule: The pivot_table_standard control must preserve all exported style settings. Only legal data-source, rows, columns, and values binding may be mapped to the current app.
whenToUse: Use when users need cross-tab analysis by row, column, and aggregate value.
Use for operational matrices, category by status summaries, owner by priority counts, or period by type totals.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for chart-only visual comparison.
Do not use on Approval forms.
